name: TaxGPT
tagline: AI-powered tax assistant for professionals and individuals
description: TaxGPT is an AI tax assistant that helps both tax professionals and individuals navigate tax preparation. It features Agent Andrew, an AI-powered audit and review tool that analyzes prepared tax documents. The platform offers instant document search by client, year, and type, and can search content inside files for rapid information retrieval.
pros: Good for both pros and individuals
cons: Not a full tax filing solution
